metadata.title: Custom Jewelry Design in Amman | Abu Sara Jewelry
metadata.description: Design your own ring or gold and diamond piece at Abu Sara Jewelry in Amman. Consultation, material selection, precise execution, and delivery of a unique piece that suits you.

subtitle: Turn your vision into reality with our bespoke jewelry design service. From concept to creation, we'll craft a piece that's uniquely yours.

form.title: Start Your Journey
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your custom jewelry design in detail...
form.required: Please fill in all required fields
form.success: Design request submitted successfully! We'll contact you within 24 hours.

fileUpload.sizeError: Image size should be less than {size}MB
fileUpload.typeError: File type not supported. Supported types: {types}

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 10 characters

1.q: How long does the custom design process take?
1.a: Typically 4-6 weeks from initial consultation to final delivery, depending on complexity.

2.q: Can I modify an existing design?
2.a: Absolutely! We can modify existing designs or create entirely new pieces based on your preferences.

3.q: What if I don't like the final design?
3.a: We involve you throughout the process and make revisions until you're completely satisfied.

4.q: Do you provide certificates of authenticity?
4.a: Yes, all custom pieces come with detailed certificates of authenticity and valuation.

services.title: Custom Design Services
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive range of custom jewelry design services to meet all your needs

engagementRings.title: Engagement Ring Design in Amman
engagementRings.description: We design unique engagement rings that express your love story, with the ability to choose the perfect gemstone and ideal gold karat.

weddingRings.title: Wedding Ring Design
weddingRings.description: We design classic or modern wedding rings with custom engravings, names, or dates to create a lasting memory for your special day.

customNecklaces.title: Custom Gold Necklace Design
customNecklaces.description: We design unique necklaces with custom sizes and shapes, with the option to add letters, symbols, or gemstones according to your preferences.

redesignJewelry.title: Old Jewelry Redesign
redesignJewelry.description: We transform your old jewelry into modern and beautiful pieces, with reworking, adding diamonds, or completely changing the design.

goldSelection.title: Gold Karat and Color Selection
goldSelection.description: We offer diverse options for gold karat (18, 21, 24 karat) and colors (yellow, white, rose) to suit your taste and budget.

whatsappProcess.sectionSubtitle: We believe the perfect piece of jewelry starts with an idea. Follow these simple steps to reach us on WhatsApp

step1.title: Share Your Idea
step1.description: Send us photos, sketches, or a simple idea of the design you want

step2.title: Free Consultation
step2.description: We'll review your request and provide immediate consultation with initial price & time estimate

step3.title: Design Approval & Start
step3.description: After you approve the design and price, we begin crafting your piece with precision

step4.title: Crafting & Delivery
step4.description: Expert artisans craft your piece and deliver it to you in Jordan or anywhere you choose

whatsappProcess.buttonText: Start Your Order on WhatsApp Now
